title: Apollo Telehealth Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Apollo Telehealth Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Telehealth Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Apollo Telehealth Capital India:
Apollo Telehealth Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Telehealth Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
